fa-shuttle-van.appearanceId: a minivan or shuttle van silhouette viewed from the side with a boxy roofline, passenger windows along the side, and sliding or hinged rear door; wide-body transport van outline with passenger windows and a high roof
fa-shuttle-van.functionalityId: represents a shuttle van or shared transport vehicle; indicates a passenger transport service, hotel shuttle, or group transit option
fa-shuttle-van.intentId: book or indicate a shuttle van or group transport service; represent a shared passenger vehicle in a travel, hotel, or transit interface

fa-shuttlecock.appearanceId: a badminton shuttlecock silhouette with a rounded cork or rubber base and a conical skirt of overlapping feathers or plastic vanes flaring upward; projectile with a dome tip and fan-shaped feather crown
fa-shuttlecock.functionalityId: represents a badminton shuttlecock or birdie used in racket sports; indicates a badminton game, court, or sports equipment category
fa-shuttlecock.intentId: select or indicate badminton in a sports or recreational activity interface; represent a shuttlecock in a sports equipment or game category

fa-sickle.appearanceId: a sickle tool silhouette with a short handle and a short deeply curved crescent blade sweeping inward at the tip; small curved harvesting blade with a short grip handle
fa-sickle.functionalityId: represents a sickle harvesting tool used for cutting crops; indicates agriculture, harvest, or a hand-held cutting action
fa-sickle.intentId: indicate a harvest or agricultural cutting task; represent a sickle tool in a farming, historical, or seasonal harvest interface

fa-sidebar.appearanceId: a rectangular UI panel layout with a narrow vertical column on the left side separated from the wider main content area on the right; two-column layout with a left sidebar panel and a larger right content region
fa-sidebar.functionalityId: toggles or represents a sidebar navigation panel on the left side of a layout; opens or collapses a side panel in a UI
fa-sidebar.intentId: show or hide a left sidebar navigation panel in an application layout; manage sidebar visibility in a dashboard or editor interface

fa-sidebar-flip.appearanceId: a rectangular UI panel layout with a narrow vertical column on the right side separated from the wider main content area on the left; two-column layout with a right sidebar panel and a larger left content region
fa-sidebar-flip.functionalityId: toggles or represents a sidebar navigation panel on the right side of a layout; opens or collapses a flipped side panel in a UI
fa-sidebar-flip.intentId: show or hide a right sidebar navigation panel in an application layout; manage flipped sidebar visibility in a dashboard or editor interface

fa-sigma.appearanceId: an uppercase Greek sigma character glyph with a wide horizontal top bar, a diagonal stroke descending to a point, and a horizontal bottom bar; capital Greek letter shaped like a stylized E with angled middle
fa-sigma.functionalityId: inserts or represents the Greek sigma symbol used for summation in mathematics or statistics; indicates a sum, aggregate, or statistical total
fa-sigma.intentId: insert a sigma summation symbol in a mathematical or statistical context; represent a total or aggregate calculation in a formula editor

fa-sign.appearanceId: a rectangular sign board on a vertical post with a flat face and a short pole below; flat-faced sign panel mounted on a single upright post
fa-sign.functionalityId: represents a physical sign, notice board, or signage element; indicates a posted notice, label, or informational sign in a context
fa-sign.intentId: indicate a physical sign or notice board in a location or navigation interface; represent a posted label or informational signage

fa-sign-in.appearanceId: a vertical rectangle or door frame shape with a rightward-pointing arrow entering from the left side through an opening; door outline with an inward-pointing arrow entering the frame
fa-sign-in.functionalityId: signs in or logs into an account or system; authenticates a user entering a secured area or application
fa-sign-in.intentId: log in or sign into a user account or secured application; authenticate entry into a system or protected resource

fa-sign-in-alt.appearanceId: a rightward-pointing arrow with a vertical line or bar on the right side indicating entry; horizontal arrow pointing into a vertical boundary or threshold marker
fa-sign-in-alt.functionalityId: signs in or logs into a system using an alternative sign-in control; enters a secured session via an alternate authentication pathway
fa-sign-in-alt.intentId: log in or authenticate into a system using an alternate sign-in control; enter a secured session in an application or portal

fa-sign-out.appearanceId: a vertical rectangle or door frame shape with a leftward-pointing arrow exiting from the right side through an opening; door outline with an outward-pointing arrow leaving the frame
fa-sign-out.functionalityId: signs out or logs out of an account or system; ends a user session and exits a secured area or application
fa-sign-out.intentId: log out or sign out of a user account or secured application; end a session and exit a system or protected resource

fa-sign-out-alt.appearanceId: a leftward-pointing arrow with a vertical line or bar on the left side indicating exit; horizontal arrow pointing away from a vertical boundary or threshold marker
fa-sign-out-alt.functionalityId: signs out or logs out of a system using an alternative sign-out control; exits a secured session via an alternate logout pathway
fa-sign-out-alt.intentId: log out or end a session using an alternate sign-out control; exit a secured application or portal

fa-sign-post.appearanceId: a single vertical post with one or two directional arrow-shaped sign boards pointing left or right attached near the top; signpost pole with one horizontal arrow-shaped placard
fa-sign-post.functionalityId: represents a directional signpost or wayfinding marker; indicates a route, direction, or navigational guide at a location
fa-sign-post.intentId: indicate a direction or route with a wayfinding signpost; represent a navigational guide or directional marker in a map or location interface

fa-sign-posts.appearanceId: a single vertical post with multiple directional arrow-shaped sign boards stacked at different heights pointing in various directions; signpost pole with several stacked horizontal arrow placards
fa-sign-posts.functionalityId: represents multiple directional signs or a multi-destination wayfinding marker; indicates several route options or navigation choices from one point
fa-sign-posts.intentId: indicate multiple directions or route options from a single wayfinding point; represent a multi-directional signpost in a navigation or mapping interface

fa-sign-posts-wrench.appearanceId: a vertical signpost with multiple stacked arrow-shaped sign boards and a small wrench icon overlaid as a badge; multi-placard signpost outline with a maintenance wrench badge
fa-sign-posts-wrench.functionalityId: represents a signpost under maintenance or configuration; indicates editing, repairing, or managing directional signage in a system
fa-sign-posts-wrench.intentId: configure or maintain directional signage in a navigation or mapping system; represent sign post maintenance or editing in a wayfinding interface

fa-signal.appearanceId: five vertical bars increasing in height from left to right, all fully filled representing maximum cellular or wireless signal strength; full five-bar signal strength indicator with all bars active
fa-signal.functionalityId: indicates the current wireless or cellular signal strength level; displays full connectivity or maximum signal reception
fa-signal.intentId: show cellular or wireless signal strength in a network or device status interface; indicate maximum connectivity in a communication application

fa-signal-1.appearanceId: five vertical bars increasing in height from left to right with only the first shortest bar filled and the remaining four bars empty or faint; one-bar signal strength indicator out of five bars
fa-signal-1.functionalityId: indicates a very weak or minimal wireless signal strength of one out of five bars; shows poor connectivity or near-loss reception
fa-signal-1.intentId: show very poor or minimal signal strength in a network or device status interface; indicate near-zero connectivity in a communication application

fa-signal-2.appearanceId: five vertical bars increasing in height from left to right with the two shortest bars filled and the remaining three bars empty or faint; two-bar signal strength indicator out of five bars
fa-signal-2.functionalityId: indicates a weak wireless signal strength of two out of five bars; shows low connectivity or marginal reception
fa-signal-2.intentId: show low or weak signal strength in a network or device status interface; indicate marginal connectivity in a communication application

fa-signal-3.appearanceId: five vertical bars increasing in height from left to right with the three shortest bars filled and the remaining two bars empty or faint; three-bar signal strength indicator out of five bars
fa-signal-3.functionalityId: indicates a moderate wireless signal strength of three out of five bars; shows acceptable or medium connectivity
fa-signal-3.intentId: show moderate or medium signal strength in a network or device status interface; indicate acceptable connectivity in a communication application

fa-signal-4.appearanceId: five vertical bars increasing in height from left to right with four bars filled and only the tallest fifth bar empty or faint; four-bar signal strength indicator out of five bars
fa-signal-4.functionalityId: indicates a strong wireless signal strength of four out of five bars; shows good connectivity approaching full reception
fa-signal-4.intentId: show strong or near-full signal strength in a network or device status interface; indicate good connectivity in a communication application

fa-signal-alt.appearanceId: four vertical bars of increasing height all fully filled arranged in an alternative or compressed style compared to the standard five-bar signal icon; full alternative-style bar signal strength indicator with all bars active
fa-signal-alt.functionalityId: indicates full signal strength in an alternative bar-style presentation; displays maximum connectivity using an alternate signal icon variant
fa-signal-alt.intentId: show full signal strength using an alternate signal style indicator; indicate maximum connectivity in a network or device interface

fa-signal-alt-1.appearanceId: four vertical bars of increasing height in the alternative style with only the first shortest bar filled and the remaining three empty or faint; one-bar alternative-style signal indicator out of four bars
fa-signal-alt-1.functionalityId: indicates very weak signal strength in the alternative bar-style; shows minimal connectivity in the alternate signal variant
fa-signal-alt-1.intentId: show very poor signal strength using an alternate one-bar signal style; indicate near-zero connectivity in a network or device interface

fa-signal-alt-2.appearanceId: four vertical bars of increasing height in the alternative style with the two shortest bars filled and the remaining two empty or faint; two-bar alternative-style signal indicator out of four bars
fa-signal-alt-2.functionalityId: indicates weak signal strength in the alternative bar-style; shows low connectivity in the alternate signal variant
fa-signal-alt-2.intentId: show low or weak signal strength using an alternate two-bar signal style; indicate poor connectivity in a network or device interface

fa-signal-alt-3.appearanceId: four vertical bars of increasing height in the alternative style with three bars filled and only the tallest fourth bar empty or faint; three-bar alternative-style signal indicator out of four bars
fa-signal-alt-3.functionalityId: indicates good signal strength in the alternative bar-style; shows strong connectivity in the alternate signal variant
fa-signal-alt-3.intentId: show strong signal strength using an alternate three-bar signal style; indicate good connectivity in a network or device interface

fa-signal-alt-slash.appearanceId: four vertical bars in the alternative signal style with a diagonal slash line drawn through all bars; alternative-style signal bar group with a strikethrough slash indicating no signal
fa-signal-alt-slash.functionalityId: indicates that the alternative signal is disabled, lost, or unavailable; shows a no-signal state in the alternate signal variant
fa-signal-alt-slash.intentId: show a lost or disabled alternate signal; indicate no connectivity or signal blockage in a network or device interface

fa-signal-slash.appearanceId: five vertical bars of increasing height with a diagonal slash line drawn through all the bars; standard five-bar signal strength indicator with a diagonal strikethrough across all bars
fa-signal-slash.functionalityId: indicates that the wireless signal is disabled, lost, or unavailable; shows a no-signal or disconnected state
fa-signal-slash.intentId: show a lost or disabled signal in a network or device status interface; indicate no connectivity or a disconnected state in a communication application

fa-signal-stream.appearanceId: a series of curved concentric arcs or waveform lines radiating outward resembling a streaming signal broadcast; curved expanding wave arcs suggesting a live signal or streaming emission
fa-signal-stream.functionalityId: represents a live signal stream or broadcast transmission; indicates a real-time data stream, live feed, or wireless broadcast
fa-signal-stream.intentId: indicate a live streaming signal or broadcast transmission; represent real-time data flow or a wireless stream in a media or communications interface

fa-signal-stream-slash.appearanceId: curved concentric arc waveform lines resembling a streaming signal with a diagonal slash line drawn through them; expanding wave arc signal shape with a strikethrough slash indicating stream interruption
fa-signal-stream-slash.functionalityId: indicates that a live signal stream or broadcast has been cut off or disabled; shows a stream interruption or lost broadcast state
fa-signal-stream-slash.intentId: indicate an interrupted or disabled signal stream; show a lost broadcast or cut-off live feed in a media or communications interface

fa-signature.appearanceId: a cursive handwritten line stroke with flowing loops and a trailing underline sweep, resembling a personal signature; freehand cursive script stroke with looping ascending and descending curves
fa-signature.functionalityId: represents a handwritten signature field or signing action; indicates a place to sign, a digital signature input, or a personal sign-off
fa-signature.intentId: sign a document or indicate a signature field in a form or contract interface; represent a personal handwritten sign-off in a digital document

fa-signature-lock.appearanceId: a cursive handwritten line stroke resembling a signature with a small padlock badge overlaid near the signature mark; flowing cursive script stroke with a lock badge indicating a secured or sealed signature
fa-signature-lock.functionalityId: represents a locked or sealed digital signature that cannot be altered; indicates a finalized or cryptographically secured signing state
fa-signature-lock.intentId: lock or finalize a digital signature to prevent modification; indicate a cryptographically sealed sign-off in a document or contract interface

fa-signature-slash.appearanceId: a cursive handwritten line stroke resembling a signature with a diagonal slash line drawn through it; flowing cursive script stroke with a strikethrough slash indicating a voided or removed signature
fa-signature-slash.functionalityId: represents a voided, removed, or declined signature; indicates that a signing action has been cancelled or a signature has been invalidated
fa-signature-slash.intentId: void or remove a signature from a document; indicate a cancelled or invalidated sign-off in a form or contract interface

fa-sim-card.appearanceId: a small rectangular SIM card silhouette with one clipped or angled corner and a contact pad area on the front face; mobile subscriber card outline with a notched corner and chip contact area
fa-sim-card.functionalityId: represents a SIM card for mobile network authentication; indicates a cellular subscriber identity module or carrier settings
fa-sim-card.intentId: manage or identify a SIM card in a mobile device or carrier settings interface; represent a cellular subscriber identity in a telecommunications context

fa-sim-cards.appearanceId: two SIM card silhouettes overlapping or arranged side-by-side, each with a clipped corner and contact pad area; pair of mobile subscriber card outlines with notched corners arranged together
fa-sim-cards.functionalityId: represents dual SIM cards or a multi-SIM device configuration; indicates a dual-SIM phone, multiple carrier slots, or SIM management
fa-sim-cards.intentId: manage dual or multiple SIM cards in a device; indicate a multi-SIM configuration or dual-carrier setup in a telecommunications interface

fa-sink.appearanceId: a bathroom or kitchen sink silhouette with a wide basin bowl, a faucet spout above the basin, and drain details at the bottom; basin sink outline with a mounted faucet and drain
fa-sink.functionalityId: represents a sink fixture in a bathroom, kitchen, or utility context; indicates plumbing, water access, or sanitation facilities
fa-sink.intentId: indicate a sink or basin fixture in a home, bathroom, or kitchen interface; represent plumbing or sanitation facilities in a building or property listing

fa-siren.appearanceId: a dome-shaped emergency siren or strobe light housing on a flat base with a rounded flashing beacon cap; hemispherical siren housing outline with a wide dome on a flat mounting base
fa-siren.functionalityId: represents an emergency siren or alarm device; indicates an active alert, emergency signal, or alarm activation
fa-siren.intentId: trigger or indicate an emergency siren or alarm; represent an active alert or emergency signal in a safety or IoT interface

fa-siren-on.appearanceId: a dome-shaped siren housing with radiating arc lines or flash lines emanating from the dome indicating an active or flashing state; hemispherical siren outline with outward flash or light-burst lines showing activation
fa-siren-on.functionalityId: represents an actively flashing or sounding emergency siren; indicates that an alarm or emergency signal is currently active
fa-siren-on.intentId: indicate that an emergency siren or alarm is currently active and flashing; represent a live alert state in a safety or monitoring interface

fa-sitemap.appearanceId: a hierarchical tree diagram with a single top node connected by lines to multiple second-level nodes, which in turn connect to further child nodes below; org-chart node tree with tiered rectangular boxes and connecting lines
fa-sitemap.functionalityId: represents a sitemap, organizational chart, or hierarchical content structure; displays or navigates a tree of pages, departments, or nodes
fa-sitemap.intentId: view or manage a site structure, organization chart, or content hierarchy; navigate a tree of pages or entities in a site management or planning interface

fa-skating.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette in a skating pose with one leg extended behind and arms outstretched for balance, wearing an ice skate boot on the grounded foot; skater body in a gliding posture with a blade boot on one foot
fa-skating.functionalityId: represents ice skating or figure skating as a sport or activity; indicates a skating rink, skating event, or winter sports category
fa-skating.intentId: indicate ice skating or a skating activity in a sports or recreation interface; represent a skating rink, figure skating event, or winter sports category

fa-skeleton.appearanceId: a full human skeleton silhouette showing a skull, rib cage, spine, arm and leg bones in an upright anatomical arrangement; complete skeletal body outline with skull, ribs, pelvis, and limb bones
fa-skeleton.functionalityId: represents a human skeleton in a medical, educational, or Halloween context; indicates anatomy, bone structure, or a spooky seasonal theme
fa-skeleton.intentId: indicate human anatomy, bone structure, or a medical context; represent a skeleton in a Halloween, horror, or educational application

fa-skeleton-ribs.appearanceId: a partial or full skeletal torso silhouette focused on the rib cage with curved rib bones arching symmetrically from a central spine; rib cage and spine outline with arching bilateral rib bone pairs
fa-skeleton-ribs.functionalityId: represents the rib cage or thoracic skeletal structure; indicates chest anatomy, respiratory protection, or a medical bone context
fa-skeleton-ribs.intentId: indicate rib cage anatomy or thoracic skeletal structure in a medical or educational context; represent chest bones or respiratory protection in an anatomy interface

fa-ski-boot.appearanceId: a stiff ski boot silhouette with a high rigid cuff, buckle closures along the shaft, and a flat sole with a toe binding ledge; hard-shell ski boot outline with buckle straps and a flat boot sole
fa-ski-boot.functionalityId: represents a ski boot or alpine skiing footwear; indicates skiing equipment, ski rentals, or a winter sports category
fa-ski-boot.intentId: select or indicate ski boot equipment in a winter sports or ski rental interface; represent alpine skiing footwear in a sports or outdoor gear catalog

fa-ski-boot-ski.appearanceId: a stiff ski boot silhouette attached to or combined with a long flat ski plank beneath; hard-shell ski boot outline with a long ski board extending below
fa-ski-boot-ski.functionalityId: represents a ski boot affixed to a ski, indicating a complete alpine skiing setup; indicates a bound ski-and-boot combination in a skiing context
fa-ski-boot-ski.intentId: indicate a complete alpine skiing setup with boot and ski combined; represent bound ski equipment in a winter sports or rental interface

fa-ski-jump.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette in a ski jump pose with skis extended forward and body leaning aerodynamically over the skis in flight; airborne skier body in a forward-lean jump posture with parallel skis
fa-ski-jump.functionalityId: represents ski jumping as a winter sport; indicates a ski jump event, slope, or aerial skiing activity
fa-ski-jump.intentId: indicate a ski jump event or aerial skiing activity in a winter sports interface; represent a ski jumping competition or ramp in a sports or event catalog

fa-ski-lift.appearanceId: a ski lift or gondola silhouette with a suspended cable car or chair hanging from an overhead wire on a support tower; cable-hung lift cabin or chairlift outline with support tower and overhead line
fa-ski-lift.functionalityId: represents a ski lift, gondola, or chairlift for mountain transport; indicates a ski resort lift access or mountain cable car service
fa-ski-lift.intentId: indicate a ski lift or gondola in a ski resort or mountain transport interface; represent lift access or cable car service in a winter sports or travel application

fa-skiing.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette in a downhill skiing pose with bent knees, poles extended, and parallel skis pointing downhill; alpine skier body in a crouched downhill posture with ski poles
fa-skiing.functionalityId: represents downhill or alpine skiing as a sport or activity; indicates a ski slope, skiing event, or winter sports category
fa-skiing.intentId: indicate downhill skiing or a ski slope in a winter sports or recreation interface; represent alpine skiing in a sports, travel, or event catalog

fa-skiing-nordic.appearanceId: a human figure silhouette in a cross-country skiing pose with one leg forward and opposite arm extended, using long thin Nordic skis and a pole; Nordic skier body in a striding cross-country posture with a ski pole
fa-skiing-nordic.functionalityId: represents Nordic or cross-country skiing as a sport or activity; indicates a cross-country ski trail, Nordic skiing event, or winter fitness activity
fa-skiing-nordic.intentId: indicate Nordic or cross-country skiing in a winter sports or recreation interface; represent a cross-country ski trail or event in a sports or travel catalog

fa-skull.appearanceId: a human skull silhouette with a rounded cranium, two hollow eye socket ovals, a triangular nasal cavity, and a row of teeth along the jaw line; bare skull with eye sockets, nasal cavity, and teeth
fa-skull.functionalityId: represents danger, death, poison, or a skull symbol in a hazard or thematic context; indicates a fatal warning, pirate theme, or Halloween decoration
fa-skull.intentId: indicate a danger, poison, or death warning; represent a skull symbol in a hazard label, pirate theme, or Halloween context

fa-skull-cow.appearanceId: a bovine skull silhouette with a broad flat cranium, two long curved horn projections extending from the sides of the skull, and empty eye socket ovals; wide cattle skull with large curving horns and hollow eye sockets
fa-skull-cow.functionalityId: represents a cow skull or longhorn cattle skull in a Western, ranch, or wilderness context; indicates a desert, cowboy, or animal remains theme
fa-skull-cow.intentId: indicate a Western, ranch, or desert theme with a cow skull; represent cattle remains or a longhorn skull in a cowboy or wilderness interface

fa-skull-crossbones.appearanceId: a human skull silhouette positioned above two crossing bones forming an X shape beneath the jaw, the classic poison or pirate symbol; skull with two crossed femur bones beneath forming a crossbones pattern
fa-skull-crossbones.functionalityId: represents a poison hazard, pirate emblem, or mortal danger warning; indicates a toxic substance, fatal risk, or pirate-themed content
fa-skull-crossbones.intentId: warn about a toxic, poisonous, or deadly hazard; represent a pirate symbol or fatal danger warning in a safety or thematic interface
